title: Australia warns of global campaign targeting vulnerable CMS platforms
description: The Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC) issued an alert about a global exploitation campaign targeting vulnerable content management systems (CMS) and plugins. [...]
author: Bill Toulas

title: 'Ghostcommit' hides prompt injection in images to fool AI agents, steal secrets
description: A PNG hiding a prompt injection could steal your repo's secrets, researchers demonstrate. The technique, dubbed 'Ghostcommit,' slipped past AI code reviewers CodeRabbit and Bugbot, which never open image files at all, then convinced a coding agent to read a repo's .env and write every secret into the code as a list of numbers. [...]
author: Ax Sharma
